mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, enable, ref_rule, ref_spec, ref_kind, rule_param, ref_md5, warn_level, sen_mode
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dm_sec_referer where ref_rule_id is null
mapper.update: update dm_sec_referer set ref_rule_id = #{ruleId}, gmt_modified= now() where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE ref_spec = #{refSpecId} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid}

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE ref_spec = #{refSpecId} and ref_kind = #{ruleKind, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleKind} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid}

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_rule = #{refRuleOrSenId} and ref_kind = #{ruleKind, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleKind}

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE ref_rule = #{refRuleOrSenId} and ref_kind = #{ruleKind, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleKind}

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_spec = #{refSpecId} and ref_rule = #{refRuleOrSenId} and ref_kind = #{ruleKind, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleKind} limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{refId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_spec = #{refSpecId}
DELETE FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{refId}
DELETE FROM dm_sec_referer WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_rule = #{refRuleOrSenId} and ref_kind = #{ruleKind, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleKind}
mapper.update:
update dm_sec_referer set enable = #{refererDO.enable}, warn_level = #{refererDO.warnLevel, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.WarnLevel}, sen_mode = #{refererDO.senMode, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleSensitiveMode},
rule_param = #{refererDO.ruleParam, typeHandler =com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, ref_md5 = #{refererDO.refMD5}, gmt_modified= now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{refId} limit 1
update dm_sec_referer set enable = 0, gmt_modified= now() where ref_rule = #{refRuleOrSenId} and ref_kind = #{ruleKind, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleKind}
